{{CargoRelic
|name=Karamono Canister
|class_id=20001
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=It's considered the most famous tea caddy during the Sengoku period in Japan, and legends say that the famous Murata Juko spent a fortune to purchase the caddy. It was then passed on to Asakura Norikage, Matsunaga Hisahide, and Oda Nobunaga, and eventually destroyed during the Honno-ji Incident.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=17
|civ=29
|tech=15
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail HP +60<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
